findings.title: Incorrect deny decision tagging for PreToolUse events
findings.issue: All PreToolUse responses with hookSpecificOutput were tagged as decision:'deny' regardless of actual permissionDecision value, causing HooksPage to render every PreToolUse event in red warning style.
findings.suggestion: Extract actual permissionDecision from hookSpecificOutput instead of hardcoding 'deny'.

findings.title: Unbounded in-memory event growth per session
findings.issue: No cap on events per session. A long-running session could accumulate unbounded events in memory.
findings.suggestion: Add splice cap at 10,000 events per session as specified in plan.md.
